raw_consumer_statement:
I was in touch with Citi XXXX XXXX in XXXX XXXX, Tx ( XXXX ) XXXX. XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX was assigned to the credit card billing dispute XXXX XXXX. 
I originally filled the dispute on XX/XX/year>. I spoke to XXXX on XX/XX/year> she assured me that she would be in touch with answers by XX/XX/year>. When I didn't hear from her I called on XX/XX/year>, I was told she was out of the office on vacation until XX/XX/year>. I was told a colleague XXXX would be in touch within XXXX hours. I called again on XX/XX/year>. I again was told to wait XXXX hours. I received a call from XXXX on XX/XX/year> she told me that I would receive a call back in XXXX hours. I called again on XX/XX/year> and again was told to wait XXXX hours for a call back from XXXX, since she was now back in the office.
